content:
Imagine paying for an eye exam just to discover your dog has an attitude. 😂



This dog has mastered the art of professional ghosting. 🌚



Connect 👉 Kanishk Yadav for advanced ghosting techniques 😌✌️

comment: Sometimes behavior that looks like a problem is actually a signal to question the assumption. Good reminder that the diagnosis matters as much as the symptom.
